title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ITC Limited Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at ITC Limited Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at ITC Limited Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Jodhpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ITC Limited Digital Technologies:
ITC Limited Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in GD&T

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ITC Limited Digital Technologies!
